subject: fix(charts): add inline comments explaining why allow-same-origin is required
body:
The original fix (c2c08fd) explained the reason in the commit message but
not in the code. A later security sweep removed it without checking history.
Adding inline comments so the next sweep sees the explanation at the point
of change, not buried in git log.

Tags: embed, charts, sandbox, docs, ai-mistakes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: activity-charts
Semver: patch
